title: rutidea orientalis
intro: Rutidea orientalis is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the African blue-flowering vine or African blue-flowered vine. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Rutidea orientalis has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots are typically used in traditional African medicine.
